title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull/push models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you use Ollama models as LLM, chat or embedding backends.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI with syntax highlighting, conversation history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS-Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client library for Ollama (Android compatible) with Kotlin extensions.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API; supports streaming chat/generate.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to Ollama.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Collection of ready-made docker-compose stacks (Ollama + Open-WebUI, Nextcloud, n8n, etc.).

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Minimal React chatbot frontend that talks to Ollama via the OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

title: ollama.nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to query Ollama models inside the editor: code explanation, generation, refactor.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models as generators or chatters in pipelines.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama (and OpenAI) responses into threads with slash commands.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLMs via Ollama for note Q&A, summarization and writing aid.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C#/.NET client for Ollama with IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform desktop chat client built with Qt6 and C++ that consumes Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library generated from Ollama’s OpenAPI spec; supports streaming chat.
